case.prediction_format: Return ranked root causes as objects with `time` as Unix seconds, `component` as a candidate root cause service, and `reason` as a candidate root cause metric.

reasoner.analysis: Checked 1260-1440s emailservice. Latency.p90 dev=+5861 to +5950 persists across all windows. Mem normal (dev=+1.8 to +21). Traces show low self_p99 (~0.3-0.5ms), confirming metric anomaly is internal latency spike. Root cause is emailservice latency.

Checked 1260-1440s emailservice. Sustained latency.p90 dev=+5859 to +5950 confirms internal latency spike as root cause. Traces show low self_p99, validating metric anomaly. Final ranking: emailservice latency first.
